stimulus: Botanists were able to grow viable seedlings of the silver thistle within a single season of identifying its native habitat in 1903. ______blank the propagation process proved far slower for the dwarf sandalwood, which botanists managed to cultivate only nine years after first documenting the plant in the wild.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. "In contrast" logically signals that the information in this sentence—that cultivating the dwarf sandalwood took nearly a decade—differs from the previous information that botanists grew silver thistle seedlings within a single season.

Choice A is incorrect because "for example" illogically signals that the dwarf sandalwood case exemplifies the previous information about silver thistle's rapid cultivation, when in fact it presents an opposing case. Choice C is incorrect because "consequently" illogically signals that the slower propagation of the sandalwood is a result of the silver thistle's success. Choice D is incorrect because "likewise" illogically signals that the two cultivation timelines are similar, when in fact they differ markedly.
